emails.subject: Deal updates
emails.body: Deal updates Kate, No we don't need to confirm those deals they are to replace deals entered by Real Time incorrectly. I am having to go back and change a number of deals from Oct., Nov. and Dec. For Oct. I need the following deals for Oct. approved and scheduled. 10/7 563994, 10/11 564001, 10/12 564002, 10/13 564004, 10/17 564007, 10/18 564012, 10/19 564015, 10/20 564016, 10/22 564017, 10/23 564018, 10/30 564019, 10/31 564024. Thanks, Les
